title: AWF Audit Log Record
description: A single L7 HTTP/HTTPS traffic decision record emitted to audit.jsonl by the AWF Squid proxy.

_schema.description: Schema identifier and version for this record.

client.description: Client IP address that originated the request (e.g. '172.30.0.20').

host.description: HTTP Host header value or CONNECT target (e.g. 'api.github.com:443').

dest.description: Destination IP address and port resolved by Squid (e.g. '140.82.114.22:443'). '-:-' when the connection was denied before upstream resolution.

method.description: HTTP method used by the client (e.g. 'CONNECT', 'GET', 'POST').

status.description: HTTP response status code. 200 = allowed, 403 = denied.

decision.description: Squid cache/hierarchy decision code. 'TCP_TUNNEL' = allowed HTTPS CONNECT, 'TCP_DENIED' = blocked, 'TCP_MISS' = allowed cache miss.

url.description: Request URL (for CONNECT: the domain:port tunnel target; for plain HTTP: the full URL).
